stemHtml: An aircraft is executing an approach on runway 22 followed by a visual manoeuvering (circling) on runway 04. During the base leg, the crew loses visual references with runway 04. Find the correct course of action?

options.a: Fly toward RWY 04 and initiate the missed approach for RWY 22.
options.b: Fly toward RWY 22 and initiate the missed approach for RWY 22.
options.c: Continue until the minimums and initiate missed approach if visual references are not recovered.
options.d: Fly toward RWY 04 and initiate the missed approach for RWY 04.
